title: Views of New York State
description: 69 photographic prints ; 18 x 23 cm. | Photographs show bridge, hotel and bathhouse in Richfield Springs. Lake front, park, court house, footbridge, high school, canal, reservoir, armory, Masonic temple, business section, etc., in Rochester. Inn, beach, amusement park, boardwalk, steamers, etc., at Rockaway on Long Island. Hotel at Round Island. Road in Rye Beach.

title: Views of New York State
description: 76 photographic prints ; 18 x 23 cm. | Photographs show Canadarago Lake, boathouses, hotel, gardens, Crown Point Light, summer school, etc., on Lake Champlain. Ruins of Ft. Frederick. Assembly hall, boat landing, Athenaeum Hotel, cottages, etc., at Lake Chautauqua. Railroad station at Dobbs Ferry. River, drive, residential street, sanitarium, etc., at Dansville. Chemung River. Amusement park at Far Rockaway. Old post road, dam, etc., at Fishkill.
